hero.title: Timeboxing, made simple
hero.subtitle: Stop over-planning, start doing. See exactly what you can realistically achieve each day — and get better at it.

separateApps.title: Your plan lives in one app, your work in another
separateApps.description: Google Calendar for meetings, Todoist for tasks, Notion for notes. Nothing talks to each other.

plansFallApart.title: By 10am, your morning plan is gone
plansFallApart.description: Slack pings, email, a 'quick sync' — your focused deep work block never stood a chance.

noReview.title: Friday comes and you can't name what you finished
noReview.description: You were busy all week. But what did you actually accomplish? You're not sure.

solution.title: How Dayopt works
solution.subtitle: Three steps to take control of your day.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: Drag tasks onto your calendar as time blocks. Syncs with Google Calendar. Commit to real hours — not wishful thinking.

execute.title: Execute
execute.description: Work through your blocks one at a time. One click to start, one click to finish. No timers to babysit.

reflect.title: Reflect
reflect.description: You planned 4 hours of deep work but delivered 2.5. Why? Dayopt shows you the patterns — so tomorrow is better.

grid.title: What makes Dayopt different
grid.subtitle: Features you won't find in a regular calendar or to-do app.

accuracyScore.title: Accuracy Score
accuracyScore.description: See how closely your day matched your plan. A simple metric that drives continuous improvement.
accuracyScore.example: Plan 2 hours of deep work, complete 1.5 → score 75%. Track weekly trends to improve your estimates.

energyMapping.title: Energy Mapping
energyMapping.description: Log your focus and energy levels throughout the day. Discover when you do your best work.
energyMapping.example: One tap after each block. After a week, see your peak hours and schedule important work there.

aiReflection.title: AI Reflection
aiReflection.description: Get personalized insights and suggestions based on your patterns. Improve without the guesswork.
aiReflection.example: Weekly summary: 'Deep work on Tuesday afternoons has a 90% completion rate. Consider blocking more.'

mission.title: Why Dayopt exists
mission.description: I built Dayopt because I kept losing days to reactive work. I had a calendar and a to-do list, but nothing that helped me plan realistically, stay on track, and learn from how I actually spent my time.
mission.builderNote: Built by an indie developer. Open development, no VC pressure, no data selling.

simple.title: Simple by design
simple.description: No feature bloat. One workflow — plan, execute, reflect — done well.

honest.title: Honest time tracking
honest.description: Not about billing hours. About understanding where your time really goes.

private.title: Your data, your business
private.description: No ads, no selling data. You pay for the product, not with your attention.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade as you grow.

free.name: Free
free.description: Everything you need to experience timeboxing

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlimited projects, AI insights, and advanced analytics

pricing.trialNote: No credit card required. Start free, upgrade anytime.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Our expert team will respond quickly.

form.title: Contact Us
form.subtitle: If you have any questions or inquiries, please feel free to contact us. Our expert staff will respond promptly.
